english: The son of Vasudeva, the divine one, who crushed Kamsa and Chanura
roman: Vasudeva sutam devam Kamsa Chanura mardanam

english: The supreme joy of Devaki — I bow to Krishna, the world-teacher
Radiant as the Atasi flower, adorned with garland and anklets
roman: Atasi pushpa sankasham hara nupura shobhitam

english: Wearing gem-studded bangles and armlets — I bow to Krishna, the world-teacher
roman: Ratna kankana keyuram Krishnam vande Jagadgurum

english: With the glory of curling locks, with a face like the full moon
With playful eyes and a smiling face — I bow to Krishna, the world-teacher
roman: Vilasi netram vismera vadanam Krishnam vande Jagadgurum

english: Fragrant with Mandara flowers, with a beautiful smile, four-armed
roman: Mandara gandha samyuktam charu hasam chaturbhujam

english: With peacock feather adorning the crest — I bow to Krishna, the world-teacher
roman: Barhi pincha vachudangam Krishnam vande Jagadgurum

english: Meditate on Krishna in the northern direction, radiant as a dark rain-cloud
roman: Uttarasyyam dishi dhyayet Krishnam nilambu daprabham

hindi: इत्यष्टकं स्तोत्रमिदं पठेद्यः, कृष्णो भवेत्तस्य हि दर्शनेन॥
english: Whoever reads these eight stanzas — by the vision of Krishna he is blessed
roman: Ity ashtakam stotram idam pathedyah, Krishno bhavettasya hi darshanen
